All Kudos feed and profile card lists are unaffected (stacked cards keep intrinsic height)
unit tests, tsc --noEmit, eslint (changed files), and next build all pass
blastRadius: Highlight carousel layout (active card + peeks + arrows)

contracts: HighlightCarousel props (kudos, pageIndex, onPrev, onNext) unchanged
